core.title: Website Rebuilds
core.description: Full site conversions from Joomla, WordPress, or legacy CMSs to the PHP/JSON flat-file stack. Architecture decisions, content migration, and launch.

content.about: Every rebuild in this channel is a real property. The process is documented from initial audit through deployment. Joomla to PHP/JSON is a specialty but any CMS conversion shows up here.
content.what_to_expect: Architecture planning, content schema design, template building, URL mapping, and the reasoning behind every structural decision.

seo.meta_description: Full site rebuild sessions: Joomla to PHP/JSON conversions, architecture decisions, and content migration documented in real time.
